title: Delegation Token Management in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'security/token/delegation' directory in Hadoop MapReduce manages delegation tokens for secure resource access. The package-info.java file within provides documentation for the DelegationTokenIdentifier class, detailing its use and stability. This directory's role is primarily informational, using a metadata documentation pattern. It does not contain core logic or direct inputs/outputs, but serves as a metadata provider for the DelegationTokenIdentifier class, detailing its audience, licensing, and stability using classes like InterfaceAudience and InterfaceStability.
